name: Pip Bernadotte
alt_names: ピップ・ベルナドット
description: Pip Bernadotte; a shallow, perverted and chainsmoking French mercenary. He and his squad The Wild Geese are hired by Hellsing after Hellsing lost its own troops in the Valentine attack. Bernadotte is a well experienced soldier, and fares surprisingly well against the undead he is put against.   ~!Later in the series, he develops romantic feelings for Seras Victoria. !~
